metadata.description: Product specification, development planning, TAPD integration, Go code review, and Kratos TDD skills

plugins.name: xy-skills
plugins.description: All skills: product specification interviewer, development plan generator, TAPD agile project management integration, Go code review, and Kratos TDD.

plugins.name: oc-spec
plugins.description: Deep product specification interviewer. Create comprehensive specs through systematic interviews.

plugins.name: oc-plan
plugins.description: Development plan generator. Read specs and output structured, phased development plans.

plugins.name: tapd
plugins.description: TAPD agile project management integration. Manage stories, bugs, tasks, iterations via TAPD API.

plugins.name: go-code-review
plugins.description: Expert Go code review for Kratos/gRPC/GORM projects. Structured P0-P3 findings with actionable fixes.

plugins.name: kratos-tdd
plugins.description: Test-Driven Development for Go Kratos microservices. Strict Red-Green-Refactor cycle across DDD layers.
